sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_mac (id UInt32, mac_address String, status UInt8);
SELECT id, MACStringToNum(mac_address) AS mac_num FROM test_mac WHERE MACStringToNum(mac_address) == 0;
SELECT id, mac_address, MACStringToNum(mac_address) AS mac_num FROM test_mac HAVING mac_num > 0 OR (mac_num == 0 AND mac_address = 'invalid_mac');
SELECT id, COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT mac_address, MACStringToNum(mac_address) AS mac_num FROM test_mac GROUP BY mac_address) AS t WHERE mac_num == 0 GROUP BY id ORDER BY id;
SELECT id FROM test_mac WHERE (MACStringToNum(mac_address) == 0 AND status == 0) OR (MACStringToNum(mac_address) > 0 AND status == 1) HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
CREATE TABLE test_mac_ext (id UInt32, mac_address Nullable(String));
SELECT mac_address, (MACStringToNum(mac_address) == 0 OR MACStringToNum(mac_address) == 1) AS is_valid FROM test_mac_ext WHERE id < 3 ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, mac_address FROM test_mac_ext WHERE mac_address IS NULL OR MACStringToNum(mac_address) IS NOT NULL AND mac_address != '';
